channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Couple shaken after Scullin home break-in and car theft
item.description: Courtni Whittaker, 21, and her partner Jaycob experienced a terrifying home invasion at their Scullin residence in North Canberra on the night of May 9, 2026. Woken by police around 2am, the couple di...

item.title: Daniel Sikkema trial: New York gallerist Brent Sikkema allegedly murdered by hired killer amid bitter divorce
item.description: A high-profile murder-for-hire trial has shaken New York’s art world. Daniel Sikkema stands accused of orchestrating the killing of his estranged husband, renowned gallerist Brent Sikkema, in Rio de J...

item.title: Australian Volunteers Resume Humanitarian Mission to Gaza Amid Risks
item.description: A group of 11 Australians has departed Türkiye as part of the final phase of the Global Sumud Flotilla mission, aimed at delivering humanitarian aid to Gaza and challenging Israel's naval blockade. Th...

item.title: Two Filipino seafarers injured in drone attack return to the Philippines
item.description: Two Filipino seafarers, part of a seven-member crew injured in a drone attack on the MV San Antonio in the Strait of Hormuz, have safely returned to the Philippines. They arrived at Ninoy Aquino Inter...

item.title: Songbayanang Choir misses jackpot by two songs in Everybody Sing
item.description: The Songbayanang Choir participated in the popular Philippine game show 'Everybody Sing,' hosted by Vice Ganda. During the jackpot round, the choir was only able to perform all required songs except f...

item.title: 'Cat' Matlala Allegedly Offers Information to IDAC in R228m SAPS Tender Corruption Case

item.title: Adjusting to Life in Regina: Finding Solace in Snow and Nature
item.description: Sidra Mundia shares her personal journey of moving from Dubai to Regina, Canada, in 2022. Initially, she was filled with excitement and hope, dreaming of experiencing snow and the vast Canadian outdoo...

item.title: Darcey Silva's ex-husband Frank Bollok: Businessman, father of two and co-parent
item.description: Darcey Silva, well known from TLC's 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days and her spin-off Darcey & Stacey, was once married to Frank Bollok. The two met in New York City, dated for about two years and ti...

item.title: Super Metro Halts Services Ahead of Nationwide Matatu Strike Over Fuel Prices
item.description: Commuters in Nairobi and other major towns may face major transport disruptions starting Monday, May 18, 2026, as matatu operators plan an industry-wide strike over soaring fuel costs. Super Metro, on...

item.title: David Crystal and His Influence on Mid-20th Century American Fashion
item.description: David Crystal was a pivotal figure in shaping American fashion during the mid-20th century. Although many associate his name with a single designer, he was actually the driving force behind the David ...

item.title: Labor faces political challenges after federal budget and broken promises
item.description: Five days after the release of the federal budget, Prime Minister Anthony Albanese and the Labor Party are confronting the political repercussions of unfulfilled promises. Treasurer Jim Chalmers faced...

item.title: Centre Approves Over 13 Lakh Rooftop Solar Systems in 10 States and UTs to Promote Clean Energy for Low-Income Families
item.description: The Indian government has given approval for installing more than 13 lakh rooftop solar systems across 10 states and Union Territories under the Utility-Led Aggregation (ULA) model. This initiative ai...

item.title: Balochistan Government Enforces One-Month Section 144 Across Province
item.description: QUETTA: The Balochistan government has officially enforced Section 144 across the entire province for a period of one month. This new regulation bans gatherings of more than five people, including sit...

item.title: Married British celebrity’s leaked affair with boxer revealed; cybersecurity expert blocked
item.description: A high-profile British female celebrity, reportedly in her 30s, has been embroiled in controversy following the leak of thousands of intimate images and messages detailing an affair with a well-known ...

item.title: Business owners criticise Labor’s Federal Budget changes to capital gains and wealth rules
item.description: Labor is facing a growing backlash over its Federal Budget changes to capital gains tax (CGT), particularly the scrapping of the 50 per cent discount, which will be replaced with an inflation-indexed ...

item.title: China’s Growth May Be Peaking Amid Economic and Demographic Challenges
item.description: A recent analysis highlights that while China continues to expand its global influence, it may be approaching the peak of its power. The article revisits predictions made six years ago suggesting that...

item.title: No Jackpot Winners in PCSO Superlotto 6/49 and Ultra Lotto 6/58 Draws on May 17, 2026
item.description: According to the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO), there were no jackpot winners in the major lotto draws held on Sunday, May 17, 2026. For the Superlotto 6/49, the winning combination was...

item.title: Young South Africans turn to social media to build businesses as personal shoppers amid rising unemployment
item.description: With South Africa’s unemployment rate climbing from 32.4% to 37.1%, many young people are turning to hustle culture for survival. One such example is 21-year-old Elona Njube, who moved to Johannesburg...

item.title: Ukraine conducts large-scale drone attacks on Moscow and Belgorod regions
item.description: In a significant escalation of the ongoing conflict, Ukraine launched nearly 600 drones in overnight attacks on Russia, resulting in four confirmed fatalities—three in the Moscow region and one in Bel...
